ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "exp_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "batch" INTEGER /* Batch number of the experiment */,
  "test_loss" REAL /* Loss observed during testing the model */,
  "mean_length" REAL /* Mean length of samples */,
  "n_samples" INTEGER /* Total number of samples used */,
  "uniq_samples" INTEGER /* Count of unique samples */,
  "good_samples" INTEGER /* Count of good samples identified */,
  "bad_samples" INTEGER /* Count of bad samples identified */,
  "novelty" REAL /* Novelty score of the model */,
  "hard_novelty" REAL /* Hard novelty score */,
  "soft_novelty" REAL /* Soft novelty score */,
  "diversity" REAL /* Diversity metric */,
  "conciseness" REAL /* Conciseness metric */,
  "solubility" REAL /* Solubility metric */,
  "naturalness" REAL /* Naturalness score */,
  "synthesizability" REAL /* Synthesizability score */,
  "model_samples" TEXT /* Model samples output filename */,
  "neg_loglike" REAL /* Negative log-likelihood of the test set */,
  "D_loss_0" REAL /* Discriminator loss for batch 0 */,
  "Accuracy_0" REAL /* Accuracy for batch 0 */,
  "D_loss_1" REAL /* Discriminator loss for batch 1 */,
  "Accuracy_1" REAL /* Accuracy for batch 1 */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model used in experiments */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for the model in JSON format */,
  "training_dataset" TEXT /* Dataset used for training the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, loss) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when this version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being trained */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training run (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training run was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., public, private) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model evaluation metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, loss) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model training parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being trained */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., learning rate, batch size) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user collaborating */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaborator was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaborator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
